Who We Are

Built for the
Edge of Safety

Angiras Industries is a deep-tech startup engineering next-generation intelligent wearable safety systems for high-risk environments — combining IoT, AI, and precision hardware design.

🛡️
Real-Time Protection
AI-powered hazard detection that acts faster than human reflexes.
📡
IoT Connected
Seamless connectivity for live monitoring and instant alerts.
⚙️
Ruggedized Hardware
Built to withstand extreme industrial and field conditions.
🧠
Adaptive AI
Systems that learn and adapt to individual user behaviour.
🏆 Startup CG Recognized
FLAGSHIP
Flagship Product

Smart Helmet
by Angiras

A next-generation IoT-powered helmet integrating accident detection, real-time intercom, GPS navigation, and instant SOS — designed for civilian riders and defence personnel.

🚨
Accident Detection
Automatic crash sensing with emergency alert dispatch
📡
IoT Connectivity
Real-time cloud sync and live location tracking
🗣️
Intercom + Voice Assistant
Hands-free communication and navigation
Get Early Access Watch Demo
Core Device

Beak Box

The heart of the Angiras ecosystem — a modular intercom unit shaped like an eagle's beak, designed to mount universally on any helmet.

01
LED Display
Shows Intercom / Music / GPS status at a glance
02
Central Control Hub
D-pad for Volume, Track Skip & Power control
03
SOS Button
Emergency Call & Voice Assistant activation
04
Integrated Mic & Speaker
Crystal-clear audio even at highway speeds
05
Universal Helmet Mount
Clip-on system compatible with any helmet brand
Our Stack

Technology
That Protects

Full-stack approach combining edge AI, IoT protocols, and precision hardware engineering.

01
Edge AI Processing
On-device ML models that run without cloud dependency for instant response even in remote areas.
02
IoT Sensor Fusion
Multi-sensor arrays — accelerometers, gyroscopes, environmental sensors & biometrics for full situational awareness.
03
Ruggedized Hardware
IP67-rated enclosures, military-grade components and extreme temperature resistance for real-world deployment.
04
Secure Cloud Platform
End-to-end encrypted pipeline for fleet management, live monitoring and predictive maintenance.
BEAK BOX CAD
Proof of Work

Working
Prototype

Our functional prototype demonstrates the full technology stack — from the Arduino IoT module to the speaker and intercom assembly integrated within the helmet casing.

●Arduino-based IoT controller
●Bluetooth intercom module
●LiPo battery pack integrated
●Speaker & mic assembly tested
●LED indicator system active

Our Journey

From Idea to
Market Reality

2022 — Inception
Company Founded
Angiras Industries was founded with a mission to build India's first AI-powered wearable safety ecosystem for high-risk workers.
2023 — Recognition
6+ Awards & GOV Recognition
Received recognition from Startup CG and garnered 6+ prestigious awards across innovation and deep-tech categories.
2023 — Traction
Meeting with District Collector
Presented Smart Helmet prototype to the District Collector of Bilaspur, CG — securing government-level interest and LOI.
Nov 2025 — Award
CG Ideathon 2025 — 3rd Position
Atharv Angiras Dubey awarded 3rd Position at Chhattisgarh Ideathon 2025 for SmartSuraksha Helmet — an IoT-powered modular safety device.
2025 — IP Protection
Patent Application Filed
Patent filed for SmartSuraksha Helmet under application no. 202521123556 — securing the core IoT-powered modular safety technology.
2025 — Next
Product Launch & Scale
Targeting full market launch across motorcycling, military, and industrial sectors.
2023 — Government RecognitionPresenting Smart Helmet prototype to the District Collector, Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh
Nov 2025 — CG TechStartAtharv Angiras Dubey with prize cheque of ₹11,000 at Chhattisgarh TechStart, Atal Nagar
Nov 2025 — Award CeremonyReceiving recognition for SmartSuraksha Helmet at Chhattisgarh TechStart 2025
CG Ideathon 2025 — 3rd PositionAtharv Angiras Dubey on stage at Award Ceremony — SmartSuraksha Helmet

Our Vision

Zero Preventable
Workplace Fatalities

We envision a world where no worker dies from a preventable accident. Angiras is building the technology infrastructure to make that possible — one device at a time.
